blocks.description: Display a grid of your all-time best selling products.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-button
blocks.title: Add to Cart Button
blocks.description: Display a call to action button which either adds the product to the cart, or links to the product page.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-categories
blocks.title: Product Categories List
blocks.description: Show all product categories as a list or dropdown.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-category
blocks.title: Products by Category
blocks.description: Display a grid of products from your selected categories.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-collection
blocks.title: Product Collection
blocks.description: Display a collection of products from your store.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-collection-no-results
blocks.title: No results
blocks.description: The contents of this block will display when there are no products found.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-description
blocks.title: Product Description
blocks.description: Displays the description of the product.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-details
blocks.title: Product Details
blocks.description: Display a product's description, attributes, and reviews

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-active
blocks.title: Active Filters
blocks.description: Display the currently active filters.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-attribute
blocks.title: Attribute Filter
blocks.description: Enable customers to filter the product grid by selecting one or more attributes, such as color.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-checkbox-list
blocks.title: List
blocks.description: Display a list of filter options.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-chips
blocks.title: Chips
blocks.description: Display filter options as chips.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-clear-button
blocks.title: Clear filters
blocks.description: Allows shoppers to clear active filters.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-price
blocks.title: Price Filter
blocks.description: Let shoppers filter products by choosing a price range.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-price-slider
blocks.title: Price Slider
blocks.description: A slider helps shopper choose a price range.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-rating
blocks.title: Rating Filter
blocks.description: Enable customers to filter the product collection by rating.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-removable-chips
blocks.title: Chips
blocks.description: Display removable active filters as chips.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-status
blocks.title: Status Filter
blocks.description: Let shoppers filter products by choosing stock status.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filter-taxonomy
blocks.title: Taxonomy Filter
blocks.description: Enable customers to filter the product collection by selecting one or more taxonomy terms, such as categories, brands, or tags.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-filters
blocks.title: Product Filters
blocks.description: Let shoppers filter products displayed on the page.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-gallery
blocks.title: Product Gallery
blocks.description: Showcase your products relevant images and media.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-gallery-large-image
blocks.title: Viewer
blocks.description: Container for the current gallery image, navigation buttons, zoom functionality and more.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-gallery-large-image-next-previous
blocks.title: Next/Previous Buttons
blocks.description: Display next and previous buttons.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-gallery-thumbnails
blocks.title: Thumbnails
blocks.description: Display the Thumbnails of a product.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-image
blocks.title: Product Image
blocks.description: Display the main product image.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-image-gallery
blocks.title: Product Image Gallery
blocks.description: Display a product's images.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-meta
blocks.title: Product Meta
blocks.description: Display a product’s SKU, categories, tags, and more.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-new
blocks.title: Newest Products
blocks.description: Display a grid of your newest products.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-on-sale
blocks.title: On Sale Products
blocks.description: Display a grid of products currently on sale.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-price
blocks.title: Product Price
blocks.description: Display the price of a product.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-rating
blocks.title: Product Rating
blocks.description: Display the average rating of a product.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-rating-counter
blocks.title: Product Rating Counter
blocks.description: Display the review count of a product

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-rating-stars
blocks.title: Product Rating Stars
blocks.description: Display the average rating of a product with stars

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-results-count
blocks.title: Product Results Count
blocks.description: Display the number of products on the archive page or search result page.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-review-author-name
blocks.title: Review Author Name
blocks.description: Displays the name of the author of the review.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-review-content
blocks.title: Review Content
blocks.description: Displays the contents of a product review.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-review-date
blocks.title: Review Date
blocks.description: Displays the date on which the review was posted.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-review-form
blocks.title: Reviews Form
blocks.description: Display a product's reviews form.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-review-rating
blocks.title: Review Rating
blocks.description: Displays the rating of a product review.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-review-template
blocks.title: Reviews Template
blocks.description: Contains the block elements used to display product reviews, like the title, author, date, rating and more.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-reviews
blocks.title: Product Reviews
blocks.description: Display a product's reviews

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-reviews-pagination
blocks.title: Reviews Pagination
blocks.description: Displays a paginated navigation to next/previous set of product reviews, when applicable.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-reviews-pagination-next
blocks.title: Reviews Next Page
blocks.description: Displays the next product review's page link.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-reviews-pagination-numbers
blocks.title: Reviews Page Numbers
blocks.description: Displays a list of page numbers for product reviews pagination.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-reviews-pagination-previous
blocks.title: Reviews Previous Page
blocks.description: Displays the previous product review's page link.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-reviews-title
blocks.title: Reviews Title
blocks.description: Displays a title with the number of reviews.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-sale-badge
blocks.title: On-Sale Badge
blocks.description: Displays an on-sale badge if the product is on-sale.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-sku
blocks.title: Product SKU
blocks.description: Displays the SKU of a product.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-specifications
blocks.title: Product Specifications
blocks.description: Display product weight, dimensions, and attributes.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-stock-indicator
blocks.title: Product Stock Indicator
blocks.description: Let shoppers know when products are out of stock or on backorder. This block is hidden when products are in stock.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-summary
blocks.title: Product Summary
blocks.description: Display a short description about a product.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-tag
blocks.title: Products by Tag
blocks.description: Display a grid of products with selected tags.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-template
blocks.title: Product Template
blocks.description: Contains the block elements used to render a product.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-title
blocks.title: Product Title
blocks.description: Display the title of a product.

blocks.name: woocommerce/product-top-rated
blocks.title: Top Rated Products
blocks.description: Display a grid of your top rated products.

blocks.name: woocommerce/products-by-attribute
blocks.title: Products by Attribute
blocks.description: Display a grid of products with selected attributes.

blocks.name: woocommerce/rating-filter
blocks.title: Filter by Rating Controls
blocks.description: Enable customers to filter the product grid by rating.

blocks.name: woocommerce/related-products
blocks.title: Related Products
blocks.description: Display related products.

blocks.name: woocommerce/reviews-by-category
blocks.title: Reviews by Category
blocks.description: Show product reviews from specific categories.

blocks.name: woocommerce/reviews-by-product
blocks.title: Reviews by Product
blocks.description: Display reviews for your products.

blocks.name: woocommerce/single-product
blocks.title: Product
blocks.description: Display a single product of your choice with full control over its presentation.

blocks.name: woocommerce/stock-filter
blocks.title: Filter by Stock Controls
blocks.description: Enable customers to filter the product grid by stock status.

blocks.name: woocommerce/store-notices
blocks.title: Store Notices
blocks.description: Display shopper-facing notifications generated by WooCommerce or extensions.
